---
title: "Owner Analysis"
author: Spencer Fern
format: html
---

## Exercise: Explore, Clean, and wrangle Data

### Setup

```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
```

### Lobster Abundance

```{r}
lobster_abundance <- readr::read_csv(here::here("data", "Lobster_Abundance_All_Years_20240411.csv")) %>%
    janitor::clean_names()
```
